The Problem

Why Most Talented Kids Never Make It

It's not a lack of talent. It's a lack of the right system, the right coaching, and the right roadmap. Here's what's holding your athlete back right now.

⚠️

Generic Coaching That Doesn't Know the Pro Path

Most coaches have never been drafted, never talked to a scout, never lived in a professional clubhouse. They're teaching theory — not reality.

📉

Travel Teams That Burn Money Without Building Prospects

Thousands of dollars every season, weekend after weekend — and scouts still don't know your kid's name. There's a smarter way to get noticed.

🏋️

No Athlete-Specific Strength Program

Baseball athleticism isn't built in a general gym class. Rotational power, explosive speed, and injury prevention require a baseball-specific approach most trainers don't have.

🧠

Zero Recruiting or Mental Game Strategy

Scouts and coaches recruit athletes they've already heard of. If your kid doesn't know how to build their profile, create a highlight reel, and approach programs — the talent doesn't matter.

9th Round Draft Pick · Miami Marlins · 2017

I know what it takes to get there because I've lived it — from youth ball in South Florida, to getting drafted by a Major League organization in 2017. After baseball, I built financial freedom through futures trading and real estate. Now I'm giving serious athletes the blueprint I wish I'd had.

I don't teach theory. I teach what the scouts, coaches, and front offices are actually looking for — because I've been on both sides of that conversation.

About Your Coach

You Don't Need Another Coach.
You Need Someone
Who's Been There.

There are thousands of baseball coaches in South Florida. There are very few who've been drafted by an MLB organization, built post-career wealth, and developed a proven system for developing athletes.

  • Miami Marlins draft pick — 9th round, 2017 — gives you inside knowledge most coaches can't access
  • Real-world recruiting knowledge: what scouts look for, how D1 programs evaluate, and how to get on their radar
  • Post-career success in trading and real estate means you're learning from someone who turned athletic discipline into lasting wealth
  • Based in South Florida — training in person and available online for athletes nationwide
The Program

Everything Your Athlete Needs.
Nothing They Don't.

This isn't a collection of drills. It's a complete athlete development system built on what actually gets kids drafted and scholarshipped.

01

Baseball-Specific Strength & Power Training

In-person sessions designed specifically for rotational athletes. We build explosive hip speed, bat velocity, arm strength, and the injury-resistant body that lets you play at your highest level every single game.

02

Swing Mechanics Video Review

Submit your at-bat footage and get a detailed breakdown from a coach who's faced professional pitching. We identify the exact mechanical inefficiencies costing you power, consistency, and contact rate.

03

Custom Drill Programs & Practice Plans

Every athlete gets a personalized drill system delivered to their phone — so practice has a purpose. No more hitting the cage for an hour without a target outcome. Every rep has a job.

04

The Pro Mindset System

The mental game separates good athletes from great ones. We develop the pressure performance habits, pre-game routines, and mental frameworks used at the professional level. Your kid will compete differently.

05

D1 Recruiting Strategy & Profile Building

How to build a highlight reel that gets watched. How to contact coaches the right way. How to position your kid so programs come to you. This is the recruiting game most families learn too late.

06

Direct Coach Access & Weekly Accountability

Direct messaging access to your coach, weekly check-ins, and a private community of serious athletes. You're never guessing what to work on next. The plan is always clear.

🛡️

The 90-Day Progress Guarantee

If your athlete completes the full program for 90 days — attends sessions, submits footage, follows the drill programs — and doesn't see measurable improvement in their athleticism and mechanics, I'll refund your final month. No questions, no hassle. I stand behind this system completely because I've seen what it does to athletes who commit to it.

Fit Check

Is This Program Right For You?

✓ This Is For You If...

  • Your athlete is serious about playing at the next level — D1, JUCO, or professional
  • You're done wasting money on travel teams that don't develop your kid's individual game
  • Your athlete is coachable and willing to put in work between sessions
  • You want a real blueprint from someone who's actually been drafted
  • You understand that premium results require premium investment
  • Your athlete is between ages 10–20 and plays baseball seriously

✗ This Is NOT For You If...

  • You want the cheapest option in the market — this isn't it
  • Your athlete isn't willing to commit to the process outside of sessions
  • You're looking for a babysitter, not a development coach
  • You want a casual hobby program, not a career-building system
  • You believe talent alone is enough without a system behind it
How It Works

From Application to Athlete.

Getting started is simple. Getting results takes commitment. Here's the exact process from your first click to your first session.

01

Apply Online

Fill out the short application below. Tell us about your athlete, their goals, and what level they're aiming for. Takes 3 minutes.

02

Intro Call

We schedule a quick 20-minute call to make sure it's a great fit. We talk goals, timeline, and the right program for your athlete.

03

Assessment

Your athlete submits their first swing video and completes an athletic baseline so we can build a precise development plan from day one.

04

Execute the Blueprint

Training starts. Weekly check-ins, drill programs, session reviews, and accountability built into every week of the program.

Limited spots — South Florida in-person training
